title: helichrysum pumilio subsp. pumilio
intro: Helichrysum pumilio subsp. pumilio, a subspecies of the Helichrysum pumilio plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern regions of South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum pumilio subsp. pumilio include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oil, capsules, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
